overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a character in futuristic armor walking through industrial corridors and entering a public bathroom facility. The environment features metallic surfaces, exposed piping, and artificial lighting typical of a space station or spacecraft interior.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the industrial corridor toward the bathroom facility

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green jacket and yellow scarf walking past the character in the opposite direction

entered.detail: tall metal shelving units with boxes and supplies
large rectangular window with metal frame showing adjacent room
exposed industrial piping and conduits running along the ceiling
thick black cables running across the metal floor
metal sliding door with illuminated BATHROOM sign above
illuminated sign reading BATHROOM above the door

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow industrial corridor with metal storage shelves on the right and large windows on the left. Exposed pipes and cables run along the ceiling and floor. A pedestrian in a green jacket passes by in the opposite direction as the character approaches a bathroom door at the end of the hall.

events.description: character enters the bathroom through the sliding metal door

agents.ego_description: entering the bathroom facility and walking toward the stalls

entered.detail: metal bathroom stall dividers with frosted glass panels
stainless steel sink basins with faucets
black and silver waste and recycling containers
metal shelving with cleaning supplies and paper products

segments.scene_description: The character enters the bathroom through the sliding door, transitioning from the corridor into the restroom interior. The space contains metal stalls, sinks on the left, and trash bins. The lighting is dimmer inside, and the character walks toward the stall area.

scene_state.functional_zone: public restroom interior with stalls and sinks

events.description: character turns right to examine the bathroom stalls more closely
character turns left and walks toward the sink area

agents.ego_description: walking around the bathroom examining the stalls, sinks, and fixtures from different angles

segments.scene_description: The character explores the bathroom interior, moving around the stall area and sink section. The camera circles around to show different angles of the metal stalls, trash bins, and fixtures. The character eventually turns back toward the entrance door, completing the exploration of the empty restroom.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright industrial corridor into the dim, sterile interior of a public restroom. It begins by tracking a character in futuristic armor through a narrow hallway lined with metal storage shelves and exposed piping, passing a pedestrian in a green jacket. As the character reaches the end of the hall, the scene shifts through a sliding door, transitioning from the open corridor into a dimmer space featuring metal sinks and trash bins. The camera then circles through the restroom, exploring the angles of the metal stalls and fixtures before finally turning back toward the entrance door.
